critical_issues.title: Initial review found empty PR diff before README commit
critical_issues.description: First code review pass reported no changed files in PR scope before implementation commit was pushed.

suggestions.title: Align credential names with workflow expectations
suggestions.description: README now explicitly uses AZURE_CLIENT_ID, AZURE_TENANT_ID, and AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID with note on mapping generic CLIENT_ID/TENANT_ID/SUBSCRIPTION_ID.

suggestions.title: Fix duplicate local-development step numbering
suggestions.description: Renumbered final local setup step from 5 to 6 for clear step-by-step flow.
